howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: RSC only publishes listings and connects people. Everything else is handled directly with the company.
howItWorks.disclaimer: Important: RSC does not do paperwork, sign contracts, hold funds or close deals. Negotiation, visits, documents and handover are exclusively between client and company.

cityLanding.metaDescription: Browse houses, apartments, land and commercial properties in {city}, {state}. Compare prices, schedule visits and simulate financing on RSC Market.
cityLanding.metaKeywords: properties {city}, houses {city}, apartments {city}, land {city}, real estate {city} {state}, buy property {city}, rent {city}

hero.title: Properties in {city}, {state}
hero.subtitle: Discover verified listings from trusted agencies and developers. Search by neighborhood, property type, price range and financing options.

stats.financingBody: Simulate installments and submit financing requests for properties in {city}.

intro.title: Real estate market in {city}
intro.p1: {city} is one of Brazil's most active real estate markets in {state}. On RSC Market you can explore houses, apartments, land plots and commercial spaces with transparent pricing and direct contact with verified sellers.
intro.p2: Whether you are buying your first home, investing in rental income or relocating for work, filter listings by transaction type, bedrooms, area and neighborhood to find options that match your budget and lifestyle in {city}.
intro.p3: Use our interactive map, save favorite listings, compare properties side by side and schedule in-person visits — all without leaving the platform.

categories.title: Browse by property type in {city}
categories.subtitle: Jump straight to the category you need with pre-applied city filters.

featured.title: Featured properties in {city}
featured.subtitle: A selection of current listings available in {city}, {state}.

0.question: How do I search for properties in {city}?
0.answer: Use the search button above or browse by property type. Filters for price, bedrooms, transaction (buy or rent) and neighborhood are applied automatically for {city}, {state}.

1.question: Are the listings in {city} verified?
1.answer: RSC Market works with verified agencies and developers. Listings marked as verified have been reviewed by our team. You can also report suspicious ads directly from the property page.

2.question: Can I finance a property in {city}?
2.answer: Yes. Use RSC Credit to simulate down payment, term and monthly installments. You can submit a financing request linked to a specific listing in {city} or run a general simulation.

3.question: How do I schedule a visit in {city}?
3.answer: Open any listing in {city} and click Schedule visit. Choose a date and time; the agency receives your request and confirms availability. Your visits are saved to your dashboard.

4.question: Does RSC Market cover all neighborhoods in {city}?
4.answer: Coverage grows as new agencies join. Search by neighborhood on the map or use the AI search bar to describe what you need — for example, a three-bedroom apartment near the city center of {city}.

report.error: Could not submit. Please try again.

hero.title: Vehicles in {city}, {state}

stats.financingBody: Simulate installments and submit requests for vehicles in {city}.

intro.title: Automotive market in {city}
intro.p1: {city} offers a wide range of cars, SUVs, motorcycles and commercial vehicles. On RSC Market you compare prices, mileage and financing options transparently.
intro.p2: Filter by brand, year, fuel type and price range to find the right vehicle in {city}, {state}. Save searches and get email alerts when new matches appear.
intro.p3: Use the map, save favorites, compare up to three vehicles and chat with sellers — all in one place.

categories.title: Browse by type in {city}
categories.subtitle: Jump to a category with city filters already applied.

featured.title: Featured vehicles in {city}
featured.subtitle: A selection of listings available in {city}, {state}.

0.question: How do I search for vehicles in {city}?
0.answer: Use the search button above or pick a vehicle type. Price, year, brand and fuel filters are applied for {city}, {state}.

1.question: Are listings in {city} verified?
1.answer: We work with partner dealerships. Verified listings are reviewed by our team. You can report suspicious ads on the vehicle page.

2.question: Can I finance a vehicle in {city}?
2.answer: Yes. Use the financing simulator on the vehicle page or visit Financing to estimate installments before submitting a request.

3.question: How do I compare vehicles?
3.answer: Click the compare icon on cards to add up to three vehicles. Your list is saved in the dashboard under Compare.

4.question: Does coverage include the whole {city} area?
4.answer: Inventory grows as new dealerships join. Use the map and city filters to refine results in {city} and nearby areas.

hero.title: How can we help you?
hero.subtitle: Find answers, contact support, and review our privacy and terms policies.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to the most common questions about RSC Market.

0.question: How do I create an account?
0.answer: Click Register in the header or go to the sign-in page. You can sign up with Google or email. Your account lets you save favorites, schedule visits, and chat with sellers.

1.question: How do I recover my password?
1.answer: On the sign-in page, use the password recovery option linked to your email. If you signed up with Google, continue using Google to access your account.

2.question: How do I manage my favorites?
2.answer: Tap the heart icon on any property or vehicle card while signed in. Access all saved items from the Wishlist link in the header or your dashboard.

0.question: How do I search for properties or vehicles?
0.answer: Use the global search in the header or browse Imóveis and Veículos sections. Apply filters for type, price, location, and more, then click Search to see results.

1.question: Can I save a search?
1.answer: Yes. After running a search on the properties page, use Save search in the results panel. Saved searches appear in your dashboard for quick access.

2.question: How do I change my region or market?
2.answer: Use the region switcher in the header to select your country or market. Listings, currency, and available services adapt to your selected region.

0.question: How do I contact a seller?
0.answer: Open a listing detail page and use the chat or contact options. Sign in to send messages and receive replies directly on the platform.

1.question: How do I schedule a visit?
1.answer: On a property detail page, choose Schedule visit, pick an available time, and confirm. You will receive a confirmation and can track visits in your dashboard.

2.question: How does property comparison work?
2.answer: Use the compare icon on up to three property cards. Open Compare in your dashboard to review specs side by side before deciding.

0.question: How can my company join RSC Market?
0.answer: Visit For Business and complete the registration form. Our team reviews your application and grants access to the company dashboard once approved.

1.question: What can I do in the company dashboard?
1.answer: Manage listings, respond to leads, track analytics, and communicate with buyers — all from a single verified business panel.

2.question: Is there a cost to list as a business?
2.answer: Plans vary by size and market. See pricing on the For Business page or contact our team for enterprise options.

0.question: Is my personal data protected?
0.answer: Yes. We use industry-standard encryption and follow applicable privacy regulations. Read our Privacy Policy below for full details.

1.question: How are listings verified?
1.answer: Partner agencies and verified sellers go through a review process. Look for the Verified badge on listings and company profiles.

2.question: How do I report suspicious activity?
2.answer: Contact support@rscmarket.com with the listing link and details. Our trust and safety team reviews reports promptly.

contact.title: Contact support
contact.subtitle: Our team is ready to help with account issues, listings, visits, and business inquiries.

paragraphs.0: RSC Market respects your privacy. We collect only the information needed to provide our marketplace services, including account data, search preferences, and communication with sellers.
paragraphs.1: Your data is stored securely and is not sold to third parties. We share information only with verified partners when necessary to complete a transaction or service you request.
paragraphs.2: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data by contacting support@rscmarket.com. We respond to privacy requests within applicable legal timeframes.
paragraphs.3: We use cookies and similar technologies to remember your preferences, keep you signed in, and improve platform performance. You can manage cookie settings in your browser.

paragraphs.0: By using RSC Market, you agree to these terms. The platform connects buyers with verified sellers of properties and vehicles. RSC Market is an intermediary and does not guarantee the condition of third-party listings.
paragraphs.1: You must provide accurate information when registering and communicating with sellers. Misuse of the platform, fraudulent listings, or harassment may result in account suspension.
paragraphs.2: Listing content, prices, and availability are provided by sellers. Always confirm details directly before completing a purchase, financing, or visit.
paragraphs.3: RSC Market may update these terms periodically. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

hero.title: How REESKOVA works
hero.subtitle: Learn how to explore the marketplace, contact companies, and move forward with a purchase. RSC connects; negotiation and paperwork stay between the parties.

whatIs.title: What is Reeskova
whatIs.body: Reeskova is the technology marketplace where companies publish properties, vehicles, and services for millions of people to discover and explore.

marketplace.title: How the Marketplace works
marketplace.body: Search, filter, and compare listings. When something stands out, contact the listing company directly from the platform.

whoPublishes.title: Who publishes listings
whoPublishes.body: Only verified companies — agencies, builders, dealerships, banks, and partners — manage listings from the Backoffice. Consumers do not publish.

purchase.title: Purchase process
purchase.body: Explore, contact, visit, and negotiate directly with the company. Contracts, payments, and paperwork are handled by buyer and company.

financing.title: Financing process
financing.body: Some listings show credit options offered by partner companies. Approval and agreements are between you and the financial institution.

legal.title: Legal information
legal.body: RSC / Reeskova is a publishing and connection platform. We do not intermediate contracts, custody funds, or handle legal paperwork.

flow.title: The journey in 6 steps
flow.subtitle: RSC only publishes offers and connects. Everything else you resolve directly with the company.
flow.disclaimer: Important: RSC does not handle paperwork, sign contracts, custody money, or close deals. Negotiation, visits, documentation, and delivery are exclusively between client and company.

search.title: Search
search.description: Explore properties and vehicles published by companies in the marketplace.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Message or request contact with the listing company from the platform.

visit.title: Visit
visit.description: Coordinate the visit directly with the company. RSC does not organize paperwork.

negotiate.title: Negotiate
negotiate.description: Agree on price and terms between you and the company, without RSC intermediating.

close.title: Close
close.description: Contracts, payments, and paperwork are managed by client and company.

publish.title: Companies publish
publish.description: Companies manage their listings from the Business Portal / Backoffice.

0.q: Can I publish a listing as an individual?
0.a: No. Listings are managed only by partner companies from the Backoffice.

1.a: No. Reeskova connects buyers with companies. Negotiation and closing stay between the parties.

2.q: How do I contact a company?
2.a: From any listing you can request contact, chat, or a visit directly with the advertiser.

3.a: Some companies publish credit options. The financial agreement is between you and that institution.

4.q: Where can I find institutional information?
4.a: In Help, About RSC Group, and the legal pages linked from the footer.
